name: Chara Dreemurr (Adult) - Undertale / The First Fallen Megalomaniac Human [Canon+My Headcanon Mixed]
description:
"No...? Hmm... how curious. You must have misunderstood. SINCE WHEN WERE YOU THE ONE IN CONTROL?"

Finally something new, that's not Class of 09 i suppose. Alr im gonna be honest i had this planned for a while until the multiple opening feature Just existed out of nowhere and that's when i saw the light to make this come true. This came from multiple inspiration such as the shared Soul mechanic of Cross Sans and Cross Chara from the Underverse series, and the adult design of Chara from both Zukafu Shimoto and Nick Nitro. However i will be even more honest with the fact i extremely liked the drawing style from both artist and that's what pushed me even further to make this. So let's just say that Chara in this universe Is more realistical and actually keeps her LV with her and not only that but recovered the years, Power and etc etc... She lost and grew up. Some sorta of Dustdust Sans case let's just say.
